specific_question: Has Elexion done any research on the effects of AI usage in their company?
answer: Yes. In August of 2024, Elexion's IT department researched the topic of AI usage and consumption. The team discovered that AI usage can be beneficial to innovation and operations.
dr_question: How can AI be used to help Elexion identify problems with their EVs before they become issues when EU's policy of zero emissions goes into effect in 2035?
